# OpenVid
> Free AI-powered online video editor. Screen recorder, cinematic zooms, professional 3D device mockups, and HD export directly in your browser.

## Overview
Openvid allows you to record your screen or upload a video, add smooth zooms, interactive 3D device mockups (similar to Rotato), cinematic camera tilts, and custom backgrounds to export a high-fidelity demo ready to share. Everything runs entirely in the browser using FFmpeg.wasm, Three.js, and Canvas API.

## Core Features
- Browser-based screen recording and drag-and-drop video upload (MP4, WebM).
- 3D Device Mockups: Wrap your videos in realistic 3D smartphones, laptops, and monitors with full rotational and perspective control (Rotato-like 3D effects).
- 2D Frames & Browsers: Add sleek context with Safari, Chrome, Arc, and Samsung frames.
- 3D Camera & Zoom: Dynamic focal zooms, tilt, pan, and advanced multi-axis rotation.
- Effects & Layers: Custom backgrounds, masking, shadows, text, and SVG overlays.
- High-Quality Export: Render up to 4K @ 30fps in MP4, WebM (with transparency), or GIF.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI.
- Video & 3D Processing: FFmpeg.wasm, MediaBunny, Three.js, WebGL.
- Auth: Supabase Auth (Google, GitHub, Twitch).

## Useful Links
- Official Website: https://openvid.dev
- Discord Community: https://discord.gg/kM5FtydGQ
